case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. MARGARET A TOTT et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT TOTT, MARGARET A DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-25-2012
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-13-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
DECLARATION FOR PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-13-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NON SERVICE REPORT; UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFT THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
